channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Manitoba Mobilizes Civil Servants to Support First Nation Flood Preparedness
item.description: The Manitoba government has called on civil servants to support flood preparation efforts on a local First Nation, highlighting an urgent need for additional manpower as spring melt raises water level...

item.title: B.C. marks 10 years of public health emergency amid ongoing toxic drug crisis
item.description: On April 14, 2026, British Columbia marked a decade since declaring a public health emergency in response to a rising number of toxic drug deaths. Over 18,000 people have died since the declaration in...

item.title: Atletico Madrid Reaches Champions League Semi-Finals Thanks to Lookman's Goal
item.description: Atletico Madrid, powered by a crucial goal from Ademola Lookman, has clawed their way into the UEFA Champions League semi-finals, edging out Barcelona 2-1 in a dramatic second-leg encounter in Riyadh....

item.title: BOC Intelligence Deputy Commissioner Resigns Citing Failure to Act on Smuggled Items
item.description: The Bureau of Customs confirmed the resignation of Intelligence Group Deputy Commissioner Romeo Allan Rosales, which took effect last Monday. According to Customs Commissioner Ariel Nepomuceno, Rosale...

item.title: London intersection closed due to overnight sinkhole
item.description: Early on April 14, 2026, a sinkhole emerged overnight at a heavily trafficked intersection in London, Ontario, prompting authorities to close the area entirely for safety reasons. Emergency crews resp...

item.title: SIC Investment Cooperative buys rocky, difficult land in Mua Hills, Machakos, raising concerns over its value and sellability
item.description: SIC Investment Cooperative, a major player in Kenya's cooperative sector, has come under scrutiny after purchasing a piece of rocky and steep land in Kito Ridge, Mua Hills area of Machakos County. The...

item.title: Reflection on Power and Justice in History
item.description: The article, titled 'La mirada del mendigo,' reflects on the relationship between power and justice, emphasizing that those who hold power rarely need to rely on justice to enforce their will. Drawing...

item.title: Raiders GM John Spytek Confirms Trade Interest in No. 1 Pick Before 2026 NFL Draft
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders general manager John Spytek revealed that several teams have reached out about trading for the team’s No. 1 overall pick ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft. During a pre-draft press confere...

item.title: Defence Minister Richard Marles announces $10.9 billion extra defence spending since 2022 and unveils updated ADF strategy
item.description: Defence Minister Richard Marles is set to address the National Press Club on Thursday to reveal a significant rise in Australian defence spending and outline the latest two-year strategy for the Austr...

item.title: Emperor Penguins and Antarctic Fur Seals Officially Listed as Endangered Due to Climate Change and Disease
item.description: Emperor penguins and Antarctic fur seals have been officially classified as endangered, reflecting the rapid environmental changes occurring in the Southern Ocean. Emperor penguins rely on sea ice for...

item.title: Roelf Meyer appointed South Africa’s ambassador to the United States amid diplomatic tensions
item.description: President Cyril Ramaphosa has officially appointed Roelf Meyer, the former National Party minister known for his crucial role in ending apartheid, as South Africa’s new ambassador to the United States...

item.title: Student dies, 100+ hospitalised following mid-day meal in Odisha school
item.description: In a tragic incident in Odisha, one student lost life and over 100 others were hospitalised after consuming the mid-day meal served at a local school. Authorities have launched an immediate investigat...

item.title: US Mediates First Direct Lebanon-Israel Talks in Decades
item.description: In Washington, US Secretary of State Marco Rubio hosted the first direct talks in decades between Israeli and Lebanese diplomats, a significant diplomatic step considering the two countries have techn...

item.title: Three Kenyan Startups Join Africa’s First Eye Health Accelerator to Improve Vision Care
item.description: The Fred Hollows Foundation has officially launched Africa's first accelerator dedicated solely to eye health innovation. Three Kenyan startups – Dot Glasses, Zuri Health, and Mamy Eyewear – are among...

item.title: King and Queen's US visit itinerary excludes meeting Epstein survivors
item.description: King Charles and Queen Camilla are scheduled to undertake a state visit to the United States from 27 to 30 April, marking the 250th anniversary of American independence. During their time in Washingto...

item.title: BINI Signals Cebu Show: Ticket Information and Details
item.description: Girl group BINI is bringing their 'Signals' world tour to Cebu this July, and fans are understandably excited! ABS-CBN has released information on how to secure tickets for the highly anticipated show...

item.title: Oyegun Mistakenly Shouts APC During ADC Convention In Abuja
item.description: For the recent African Democratic Congress (ADC) national convention wey happen for Rainbow Centre, Abuja, small drama burst out when former All Progressives Congress (APC) chairman, John Odigie-Oyegu...

item.title: Challenges and Costs of Renovating 24 Sussex Drive
item.description: For years, 24 Sussex Drive, the official residence of Canada's Prime Minister, has suffered from significant structural and maintenance issues. These problems have persisted across multiple government...

item.title: Health ministry urged to investigate Meru infant deaths after vaccines
item.description: Kenya has made impressive progress in reducing child mortality over the past decade, with improvements in under-five mortality rates, skilled birth attendance, and immunisation coverage reaching about...

item.title: BJP announces financial support schemes for women in Tamil Nadu ahead of Assembly polls
item.description: Ahead of the Tamil Nadu Assembly elections scheduled for April 23, 2026, the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) has unveiled a detailed manifesto focusing on women-centric welfare schemes. The party has pro...
